package rulecoverage

func NegativeGinHandlerUsesActionParamSwitchForManyUseCases() string {
    ruleID := "gin_handler_uses_action_param_switch_for_many_use_cases"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that branch on `action`, `type`, or mode strings to serve many workflows from one endpoint function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
